workflow.name: release-suite
workflow.yaml:
apiVersion: testworkflows.testkube.io/v1
kind: TestWorkflow
metadata:
  name: release-suite
  labels:
    type: suite
spec:
  config:
    runGo:
      type: boolean
      default: true
    runPlaywright:
      type: boolean
      default: true
    runCypress:
      type: boolean
      default: true
    runK6:
      type: boolean
      default: false
  container:
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 32m
        memory: 32Mi
  steps:
  - name: Go unit
    condition: config.runGo
    execute:
      workflows:
      - name: go-unit
  - name: Playwright
    condition: config.runPlaywright
    execute:
      workflows:
      - name: playwright-smoke
  - name: Cypress
    condition: config.runCypress
    execute:
      workflows:
      - name: cypress-smoke
  - name: K6 load
    condition: config.runK6
    execute:
      workflows:
      - name: k6-load
        config:
          # optional: pass params to the child
          vus: 10
          duration: 30s

notes: Composed 4 discovered suites into one orchestrator via execute.workflows.
Each suite gated by a boolean spec.config toggle + condition; runK6 defaults false (load test opt-in).
Child workflows (go-unit, playwright-smoke, cypress-smoke, k6-load) are referenced by name and must exist; --dry-run marked skipped (no reachable context).
